basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Librarian Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) has officially announced the Librarian Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published under Advt. No. 4 of 2026–2027 at Mizoram PSC Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 18 to 35 years (as on 01 January 2026, with up to 5 years relaxation for SC/ST) and hold a B.Lib.Sc degree from a recognized University can now submit their online applications up to 29 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Min: 18 years, Max: 35 years as on 1st January, 2026. Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates.
age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years as on 1st January, 2026. Age relaxation up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Lib.Sc degree from a recognized University.
qualification.details: Librarian: B.Lib.Sc degree from a recognized University.

selection_process: Direct Recruitment Examination Computer Proficiency Test Mizo Language Proficiency Test
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Librarian recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Mizoram PSC Librarian recruitment is 29-05-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the minimum age requirement for the Librarian post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Librarian post is 18 years as on 1st January, 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Librarian post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Librarian post is 35 years as on 1st January, 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Are there any age relaxations for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Librarian post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is a B.Lib.Sc degree from a recognized University.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Librarian post?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy available for the Librarian post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary for the Librarian post?
faq.answer: The salary for the Librarian post is Level – 8 in the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q8. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Online.

faq.question: Q9. What are the selection stages for the Librarian post?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Direct Recruitment Examination, Computer Proficiency Test, and Mizo Language Proficiency Test.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the official notification and apply online through the Mizoram PSC website, links for which are provided in the Important Links section.
